Gold spot (XAU/USD) is **$5,022.10 per troy ounce** right now. ([xau.today](https://xau.today/?utm_source=openai))  
Using **1 USD = 279.625 PKR** (mid‑market): ([wise.com](https://wise.com/us/compare/ofx-usd-to-pkr?utm_source=openai))

- **1 oz:** **$5,022.10** → **≈ PKR 1,404,305**
- **1 gram:** **≈ $161.46** → **≈ PKR 45,149**
- **1 tola (11.664g):** **≈ $1,883.32** → **≈ PKR 526,623** ([xau.today](https://xau.today/?utm_source=openai))

Is it a good time to buy? For **long‑term savings/hedge**, a safer approach is **small buys over time (DCA)**; for **short‑term trading**, it’s riskier—and Pakistan retail prices often differ from spot due to premiums/making charges/taxes and the FX rate you actually get.
